info.name: DabApp – Trainer Module (Complete)
info.description:
## DabApp Trainer Module — Complete API Collection

Three actors, one collection:
- **Admin** — manage levels, review & approve trainers, oversee bookings
- **Trainer** — register, build profile, manage courses & sessions
- **Client** — discover trainers, book sessions, confirm completion, review

### Quick start
1. Run **Admin / Login** → `{{admin_token}}` saved
2. Run **Trainer / Login** → `{{trainer_token}}` saved
3. Run **Client / Login** → `{{token}}` saved
4. Follow each folder top-to-bottom — variables are saved automatically

### Credentials
| Role | Email | Password |
|---|---|---|
| Admin | admin@dabapp.com | YourAdminPassword |
| Trainer | trainer@dabapp.com | YourTrainerPassword |
| Client | client@dabapp.com | YourClientPassword |

### Variable reference
| Variable | Set by |
|---|---|
| `token` | Client login |
| `trainer_token` | Trainer login |
| `admin_token` | Admin login |
| `trainer_id` | Trainer register / GET trainers |
| `location_id` | POST add location |
| `course_id` | POST create course |
| `booking_id` | POST book |
| `equipment_id` | POST select equipment |
| `equipment_type_id` | GET equipment catalog |
| `gallery_id` | POST add gallery |
| `level_id` | 1=Beginner 2=Intermediate 3=Advanced |
| `payment_url` | POST book |
| `garage_id` | POST add bike to garage |

request.description: Public. Returns active levels (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced). Saves `{{level_id}}`.
Returns all levels including inactive ones.

item.name: — Equipment Catalog
item.description: Admin manages the global equipment catalog. Trainers can only select from this list — they cannot add free-form items.

request.description:
All types (active and inactive). Saves `{{equipment_type_id}}`.

Default seeded:
- 1 = Helmet (خوذة)
- 2 = Jacket (جاكيت)
- 3 = Knee Protector (واقي الركبة)
- 4 = Back Protector (واقي الظهر)
- 5 = Gloves (قفازات)
- 6 = Boots (أحذية)
`name` must be unique. `icon` is the frontend key (SVG name or emoji key).
Send only the fields to change. `is_active=false` hides it from trainer selection.
Hard delete. Linked trainer_equipment rows will have FK set to null.
Filter: `?trainer_id=`, `?status=`, `?from_date=`, `?to_date=`.
TEST ONLY — Truncates all trainer tables. Keeps trainer_levels and specialties. **Remove before production.**

item.name: Trainer
item.description:
Trainer-side endpoints — requires `{{trainer_token}}`.

## ⚠️ Full registration flow (run in order)

### PHASE 1 — Trainer submits profile (admin has NOT approved yet)
1. **Login**
2. **Registration** → upload photos → `POST register`
3. **My Garage** → GET brands → GET models → GET years → POST add bike → PATCH training info
4. **Training Bikes** → POST select from garage
5. **Equipment** → GET catalog → POST select from catalog

> Admin can now view the complete profile (bikes + equipment) and decide on approval.

### PHASE 2 — Admin verifies and approves
→ Switch to **Admin / Trainer Applications** → `POST approve levels`

### PHASE 3 — Trainer completes post-approval setup
6. **Location & Schedule**
7. **Courses** → create → publish
8. **Session Descriptions**
9. **Gallery**

exec: if (id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('trainer_id', String(id)); console.log('trainer_id saved:', id); }

body.raw:
{

    { "level_id": 1, "price": 150 },
    { "level_id": 2, "price": 220 },
    { "level_id": 3, "price": 350 }
  ]
}

request.description: Status starts as `pending` until admin approves. Add bikes to My Garage after registering, then select them as training bikes.

exec: if (t && t.id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('trainer_id', String(t.id)); console.log('trainer_id:', t.id, '| status:', t.status); }

item.name: — My Garage  [STEP 1 – Add Bikes]
item.description:
Add motorcycles to your personal garage before selecting them as training bikes.

**Complete bike setup flow:**
1. GET brands → note `brand_id`
2. GET models by brand_id → note `model_id`
3. GET years by model_id → note `year_id`
4. POST add bike to garage → saves `{{garage_id}}`
5. PATCH add training info (plate + insurance) — required before selecting as training bike
6. → Go to **Training Bikes** folder to complete setup

request.description:
Public. Returns all motorcycle brands.

Copy the `id` you want and use it in step 2.

Example response:
```json
[{"id": 7, "name": "BMW"}, {"id": 12, "name": "Honda"}, ...]
```

Public. **Replace `7`** with your brand ID from step 1.

Returns all models for that brand. Copy the model `id` for step 3.

Example: `/motorcycle/models/7` → BMW GS 1250, BMW R1250, ...

Public. **Replace `1`** with your model ID from step 2.

Returns year variants for that model. Copy the year `id` for step 4.

Example: `/motorcycle/years/1` → [{"id":3, "year":2024}, {"id":4, "year":2023}, ...]
List all bikes in the trainer's garage. Saves first bike as `{{garage_id}}`.

exec: if (id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('garage_id', String(id)); console.log('garage_id saved:', id); }

request.description:
Add a motorcycle using IDs from steps 1-3.

- `brand_id` = 7 (BMW — from step 1)
- `model_id` = 1 (GS 1250 — from step 2, must belong to brand)
- `year_id` = 1 (2025 — from step 3, must belong to model)
- `title` optional nickname

Saves `{{garage_id}}`.

item.name: 6 · PATCH add training info  ← required before selecting as training bike

request.description:
All 3 fields required for `is_training_ready: true`.

Until this is filled, the bike won't show as training-ready in the Training Bikes list.
Shows all garage bikes with `is_training_ready` flag and `missing_fields` list.
Removes from garage entirely. Also removes from training bikes list if selected.

item.name: — Training Bikes  [STEP 2 – Select from Garage]
item.description:
Select bikes from My Garage as training bikes.

**Pre-requisite:** Bike must be in My Garage AND have `plate_number`, `insurance_expiry`, and `insurance_covers_training` set (step 6 in My Garage).

**Flow:**
1. POST select bike → use `garage_id` from My Garage
2. PATCH set-primary if you have multiple bikes
3. DELETE removes from training list only (bike stays in garage)

exec: if (list.length) { pm.collectionVariables.set('garage_id', String(list[0].garage_id)); console.log('garage_id:', list[0].garage_id, '| ready:', list[0].is_training_ready); }

request.description: Returns all garage bikes selected for training. Each includes `is_training_ready` flag showing if plate + insurance are filled.

exec: if (d && d.garage_id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('garage_id', String(d.garage_id)); console.log('garage_id:', d.garage_id); }
pm.test('Bike selected as training bike', () => pm.response.to.have.status(201));

request.description:
Select a garage bike as a training bike.

- `garage_id` — from My Garage (saved as `{{garage_id}}`)
- `is_primary` — set to true for the main training bike (auto-clears other primary)

Returns 409 if bike already selected.
Marks this bike as primary. All other training bikes are set to non-primary automatically.
Removes the bike from the training list only. The bike stays in My Garage.

item.name: — Equipment  [STEP 3 – Select from Catalog]
item.description:
Select equipment from the admin-managed catalog.

**Flow:**
1. GET catalog (public) → see available types and their IDs
2. POST select → send array of type IDs in one request
3. GET my equipment → confirm selection
4. PATCH toggle `is_available` anytime
5. DELETE to remove from your selection

exec: if (list.length) { pm.collectionVariables.set('equipment_type_id', String(list[0].id)); console.log('Types:', list.map(t => t.id + '=' + t.name).join(', ')); }

request.description:
Public endpoint. Returns all active equipment types.

Default types:
- id=1 → Helmet (خوذة)
- id=2 → Jacket (جاكيت)
- id=3 → Knee Protector (واقي الركبة)
- id=4 → Back Protector (واقي الظهر)
- id=5 → Gloves (قفازات)
- id=6 → Boots (أحذية)

Saves `{{equipment_type_id}}`.

Select equipment types by their catalog IDs.

Names, Arabic translations, and icons are copied automatically from the catalog. Already-selected types are skipped (no duplicates).

Saves `{{equipment_id}}` (first created item's row ID).
Returns all equipment types the trainer has selected, with `is_available` flag.

`equipment_id` is the row ID in the trainer's selection (not the catalog type ID).

`is_available=false` hides this item from clients.
Remove an equipment item from the trainer's selection. Does not affect the global catalog.

exec: if (id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('location_id', String(id)); console.log('location_id saved:', id); }

request.description: `day_of_week`: 0=Sunday … 6=Saturday.
All courses (all statuses). Filter: `?status=draft|published|archived`.

exec: if (id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('course_id', String(id)); console.log('course_id saved:', id); }

}

{
  "title": "Home Visit — Beginner Training",

  "description": "I come to your location.",
  "level_id": 1,
  "hours_per_session": 2,
  "total_sessions": 3,
  "original_price": 200,
  "can_travel": true,
  "price_per_km": 2.50
}

request.description: Trainer travels to client. `price_per_km` is required when `can_travel=true`.
`draft` or `archived` → `published` + `is_active=true`. Course becomes visible to clients.
`published` → `archived` + `is_active=false`. Hidden from clients. Can be republished later.
Only `draft` or `archived` courses can be deleted. Published courses must be archived first.

exec: if (data.length) { pm.collectionVariables.set('gallery_id', String(data[0].id)); console.log('gallery_id saved:', data[0].id); }

request.description: Filter: `?status=confirmed|in_progress|awaiting_confirmation|completed`.
`confirmed` → `in_progress`. Requires `payment_status=paid`.
`in_progress` → `awaiting_confirmation`. Client is notified to confirm.

item.name: Client
item.description:
Client endpoints — requires `{{token}}`.

Flow: Login → Discover trainers → view bikes & equipment → browse courses → check availability → book → pay → confirm → review.

exec: if (Array.isArray(list) && list.length) { pm.collectionVariables.set('trainer_id', String(list[0].id)); console.log('trainer_id:', list[0].id); }

request.description: Filter: `?specialty_id=`, `?level_id=`, `?city_id=`, `?search=`.
Full profile: specialties, approved levels with prices, locations, training bikes, equipment, gallery, reviews.

Returns bikes the trainer uses for training. Shows brand, model, year, title, is_primary.

Only returns data for approved trainers.
Returns only available equipment (`is_available=true`). Includes name, name_ar, icon.
Published courses only (`status=published` AND `is_active=true`). Filter: `?level_id=`.

exec: if (d.total_with_travel !== undefined) { console.log('Session: ' + d.session_price + ' | Travel: ' + d.travel_cost + ' | TOTAL: ' + d.total_with_travel); }

request.description: Only works when course has `can_travel=true` and `price_per_km` set.
Includes `can_review` flag (true when completed and not yet reviewed).
`awaiting_confirmation` → `completed`.
